differential_diagnoses: Influenza pneumonia with acute respiratory distress syndrome
Dengue hemorrhagic fever with pulmonary complications
next_steps: Send serum for Hantavirus-specific IgM and PCR testing
Perform bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for cytology, microbiology, and fungal culture
Order autoimmune serology panel (ANCA, Anti-GBM, ANA)
Repeat serum creatinine and evaluate for progression of renal failure
Monitor for hemodynamic instability and consider vasopressor support
Consult infectious disease for zoonotic exposure assessment in the Chascomús region

differential_diagnoses: Severe influenza pneumonia (negative test potential false negative or secondary bacterial superinfection)
Diffuse alveolar hemorrhage (secondary to ANCA-associated vasculitis)
Capillary leak syndrome secondary to overwhelming sepsis
next_steps: Send serum for Hantavirus-specific IgM and IgG antibodies (ELISA) and real-time RT-PCR
Obtain autoimmune workup including ANCA, anti-GBM, and ANA
Request peripheral blood smear to evaluate for atypical lymphocytes and schistocytes
Check serum ferritin, LDH, and triglycerides to screen for secondary hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis
Perform bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for comprehensive infectious panel (including viral, bacterial, and fungal pathogens)
Obtain formal transthoracic echocardiogram to exclude occult myocardial involvement
Consult infectious disease for specialized zoonotic testing relevant to the Buenos Aires/Chascomús region
